name: @clawmasons/mason-monorepo
description: Mason — npm-native packaging, governance, and runtime portability for AI agents

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/shared packages/proxy && npm run build --workspace=packages/agent-sdk && npm run build --workspace=packages/mcp-agent && npm run build:types --workspace=packages/mcp-agent && npm run build --workspace=packages/agent-entry && npm run build --workspace=packages/claude-code-agent && npm run build --workspace=packages/pi-coding-agent && tsc -b packages/cli && npm run build:proxy --workspace=packages/cli
